## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation and SEO services to Fieldguide team](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-driven content creation, focusing on high-quality, SEO-optimized editorial content to boost organic traffic and LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Fieldguide team is interested but cautious about maintaining their brand voice and content accuracy in a B2B context](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Next steps include a follow-up meeting with Marcel (GrowthX founder) and reviewing a sample Statement of Work (SoW)](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Approach and Services

  - [End-to-end partner for SEO strategy and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [AI workflows combined with human expertise for daily publishing (10+ articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
  - [Strategy sprint to develop artifacts (personas, topics) followed by growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Team includes managing director, managing editor, and content manager](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
  - [Platform handles LLM monitoring and analytics (partnered with Scrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [AI-driven workflows for research, writing, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Human intervention for quality control and brand voice alignment](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Flexibility in content placement (blog, new website sections, microsites)](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content as foundation, with potential for expansion](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)

### Client Concerns and GrowthX's Solutions

  - [Accuracy and brand voice preservation, especially for B2B companies](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Strategy sprint develops rich artifacts to capture company voice and persona details](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Custom workflows can incorporate expert review steps (e.g., chief medical officer)](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Initial close collaboration to calibrate content quality, transitioning to more autonomous production](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)

### Pricing and Timeline

  - [Phase 1 (Strategy Sprint): $20,000 fixed fee, 8 weeks, includes 20+ published articles](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [Phase 2 (Growth Execution): $15,000/month for 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Option to opt-out before Phase 2 if not satisfied](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Typical 4-week lead time for strategy sprint kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Friday, September 12th at 2 PM Pacific with Marcel (GrowthX founder)](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [GrowthX to send sample Statement of Work (SoW) detailing deliverables and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Fieldguide team to review SoW and prepare questions for the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose tentative start date for potential Phase 1 engagement](https://fathom.video/share/UxfrKs6XFA-qaPd_EBNYeXUuWQNBCE3A?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
